notes: ILLUSTRATIVE SAMPLE DATA — these companies are invented to demonstrate the shape of a Convexity scan. Convexity is a research & screening tool, not a predictor and not investment advice. Nothing here reflects a real market view.
This file was produced by scripts/generate_sample.py as a fallback because a live offline scan was unavailable in the generating environment.
All five companies are fictional; tickers, names and every number are fabricated to illustrate the structure of a Convexity scan only.
Convexity surfaces names where many INDEPENDENT signals agree — it is a research & screening aid, never a predictor and never investment advice.
Sample scan: 25 candidate(s) screened, 5 analysed, 0 fetch error(s) (illustrative).
